title: Dishmatic Refillable Washing-Up Liquid Dispensing Handle x1, Antibacterial Easy-Grip Kitchen Washing-Up Tool, with Replaceable General Purpose Sponge Heads x 6
features: Refillable and Re-useable: Simply fill the handle with washing up liquid, the sponge automatically dispenses the product so you can enjoy a comfortable and effortless washing up experience
Protect Your Hands: Dishmatic’s easy-to-use handle means you can wash for longer, keeping your hands out of the water and preventing wrinkled and dry hands
Designed for Comfort: The Dishmatic brush handle is ergonomically designed for excellent grip and easy use so you can wash up efficiently and save time
Take on Every Surface: With interchangeable sponges, our washing up handle can reach tough areas and tackle stubborn surfaces
Made in the UK: Dishmatic is the world’s No 1 provider of the refillable washing up handle where all our products are manufactured and assembled in the UK
